request.prompt: Create a polished anime-style chibi OGP card for a shareable X post. Character identity: 潜伏スパイ (ORLI). This must be the exact same character as the reference chibi, not a redesign. Preserve the same face, hairstyle, outfit, props, and core color palette as the reference chibi. Keep the result cute and chibi-proportioned, but not static, idle, or sticker-like. The generated image itself must include the title typography as part of the final design. Render the exact Japanese title text "潜伏スパイ". Render the exact type code text "ORLI". Keep the spelling, casing, and character order exact. Do not translate, paraphrase, or replace the requested text. Do not translate the Japanese title into English or any other language. The only Latin letters allowed in the image are the exact type code characters. Place the title and type code as integrated editorial typography on the left side of the composition. The typography should feel designed into the image, not pasted on afterward. Gender presentation: male. Age impression: 20代後半. Archetype: 影に潜む情報工作員. Character notes: 表情を多く見せず、必要な瞬間だけ急所へ踏み込む寡黙な青年。暗い場所ほど輪郭が際立つ。. Outfit and props: 黒のハイカラーコート、ダークグレーのシャツ、レザーグローブ、細いチェーン。隠密性と洗練が同居する装い。. Core palette: black, dark gray, steel blue. Expression: 感情を伏せた鋭い視線. Base pose cue from the type data: 肩を少し引きながら横目で相手を読む. Supporting visual hints: Character illustration for a murder mystery personality result card. One Japanese male character in his late 20s, shadowy undercover spy archetype, quiet with sharp eyes, jet black closely cropped hair. Black high-collar coat, dark gray shirt, leather gloves, thin chain accessory. Waist-up composition, low-key cinematic lighting, black and steel-blue background, highly detailed, no logo マーダーミステリー診断の結果カード用イラスト。日本人男性キャラクター1人, 20代後半, 影に潜む潜伏スパイタイプ, 寡黙で鋭い目, ジェットブラックの短く刈り込んだ髪。黒のハイカラーコート, ダークグレーのシャツ, レザーグローブ, 細いチェーンアクセサリー。上半身構図, 暗がりのシネマティック照明, 黒と鋼色を基調にした背景, 精密描写, ロゴなし. Pose direction (action-forward): Drive the character into an extreme action pose with aggressive motion. Prefer striking asymmetry, visible torso twist, foreshortening, and a silhouette that feels caught mid-scene rather than posed. Allow daring body orientations such as leaning hard, near-fall recovery, floor-level sprawl, airborne kick, or other unconventional but readable action. Favor cinematic camera work such as top-down, low-angle, dutch tilt, or dramatic close perspective. Do not default to safe eye-level framing. Compose exactly one character, large in frame, with a strong diagonal silhouette. Make the pose extremely bold, asymmetrical, and mid-action. Ensure either the torso twist, limb action, or gaze direction clearly suggests motion. Prefer a composition that feels surprising and physically dynamic rather than neat or centered. An unusual camera angle is welcome if readability stays strong. Use a restrained atmospheric background with minimal clutter and clean value separation. Keep the integrated title and type code highly readable at social-card size. Keep the bottom-right corner visually simple and blank. Do not place any text there. Do not add any text other than the exact requested title and type code. Do not add logo, watermark, extra characters, or a plain upright pose. Avoid: multiple characters, childish proportions, overly comedic expression, excessive skin exposure, overly casual modern outfit, low resolution, blurry, logo, watermark, extra props, deformed hands, 複数人, 子供っぽい体型, コミカルすぎる表情, 過度な露出, 現代カジュアルすぎる服装, 低解像度, ぼやけ, ロゴ, 透かし, 余計な小物, 手の崩れ, static standing pose, symmetrical pose, tiny character, unreadable silhouette, redesigned outfit, missing props, cluttered background, extra text beyond the exact requested title and type code, translated title, english headline, subtitle, brand label, caption, wrong spelling in the requested title or type code.
